items.title: OmniDirector: General Multi-Shot Camera Cloning without Cross-Paired Data
items.summary: Researchers introduce OmniDirector, a novel method for general multi-shot camera cloning that eliminates the need for cross-paired data, simplifying the process of creating realistic camera effects.

items.title: Meta's new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
items.summary: Meta has launched a new 'AI Mode' on Facebook that leverages public information across its various platforms to enhance user experience and content generation.

items.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
items.summary: Anthropic introduces Cowork, a new Claude AI desktop agent designed to interact directly with user files and workflows without requiring any coding expertise, aiming to boost productivity.

items.title: APPO: Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization
items.summary: A new research paper proposes Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization (APPO), enhancing reinforcement learning agents with procedural knowledge for more efficient and robust policy learning.

items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.summary: Salesforce has deployed an advanced Slackbot AI agent, intensifying its competition with Microsoft and Google in the rapidly evolving workplace AI market.

items.title: Memory is Reconstructed, Not Retrieved: Graph Memory for LLM Agents
items.summary: A new paper suggests that LLM agents don't simply retrieve memories but reconstruct them using a graph-based memory system, offering a more dynamic approach to AI memory.

items.title: The US government's Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
items.summary: New reports clarify that the US government's ban on certain Anthropic AI models was not due to an AI jailbreak, but rather other undisclosed concerns.

items.title: From Chatbot to Digital Colleague: The Paradigm Shift Toward Persistent Autonomous AI
items.summary: This paper explores the evolution of AI from simple chatbots to persistent autonomous digital colleagues, highlighting a significant paradigm shift in AI agent design and capability.

items.title: Measuring Epistemic Resilience of LLMs Under Misleading Medical Context
items.summary: Researchers are developing methods to measure the epistemic resilience of Large Language Models when exposed to misleading medical information, crucial for their safe deployment in healthcare.

items.title: Orchestra-o1: Omnimodal Agent Orchestration
items.summary: Orchestra-o1 introduces a new framework for omnimodal agent orchestration, enabling complex coordination and interaction across various AI agents and modalities.

items.title: HarnessX: A Composable, Adaptive, and Evolvable Agent Harness Foundry
items.summary: HarnessX presents a foundry for creating composable, adaptive, and evolvable AI agent harnesses, offering a flexible platform for developing sophisticated AI systems.

items.title: Rethinking RAG in Long Videos: What to Retrieve and How to Use It?
items.summary: This research re-evaluates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for long video content, exploring optimal strategies for information retrieval and utilization within extended visual narratives.

items.title: Fable 5 Went Dark Friday Night. I Ran My Critical Workflow on a Backup Saturday - Here's What Broke
items.summary: A user recounts the challenges and failures encountered when a critical workflow relying on Fable 5 AI service had to be switched to a backup system after an unexpected outage.

items.title: Building a Chrome Extension to Make AI Use More Intentional
items.summary: A developer shares insights on creating a Chrome extension designed to encourage more intentional and mindful use of AI tools in daily browsing.

items.title: Turning Gemma 4 into an Old Korean Translator
items.summary: This article details the process of fine-tuning Google's Gemma 4 model to function as an effective translator for Old Korean, showcasing its adaptability for specialized linguistic tasks.
